archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Modified for Premium Food Delivery

spacing_and_layout.mobile_first_rules: Build entirely for mobile viewports (max-w-md mx-auto if viewed on desktop). Sticky bottom navigation is mandatory.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Use dense packing for restaurant listings. Highlight featured restaurants with larger bento tiles spanning full width, and standard lists spanning half width.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF8F00] text-white rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold hover:bg-[#FF8F00]/90 transition-colors shadow-[0_8px_16px_rgba(255,143,0,0.3)] w-full flex justify-center items-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1F1F1F] text-white rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors w-full flex justify-center items-center

cards.restaurant: bg-[#1F1F1F] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border border-white/5 flex flex-col hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300
cards.cart_group: bg-black/40 rounded-3xl p-5 border border-white/10 space-y-4 mb-4

inputs.search: w-full bg-[#1F1F1F] text-white placeholder-[#B0B0B0] rounded-2xl py-4 px-5 border border-white/5 focus:border-[#FF8F00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF8F00] transition-all outline-none

navigation.bottom_tab: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#121212]/85 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 p-4 pb-8 flex justify-around items-center z-50

badges.rating: bg-[#FF8F00]/20 text-[#FF8F00] px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-1 backdrop-blur-md

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Buttons scale down slightly on active (active:scale-95).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up (translate-y-4 to 0) for new screens.
motion_and_interactions.cart_interactions: Swiping items in cart, micro-animations when adding to cart.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use lucide-react icons with stroke-width 2. Keep icons minimal and crisp. Ensure you install via 'yarn add lucide-react'.

image_urls.description: Gourmet burger for featured restaurant banner
Neapolitan pizza for popular restaurant card
Artistic salmon sushi for luxury dining card
Driver on motorbike at night for driver tracking screen backdrop or profile

specific_screen_rules.multi_restaurant_cart: CORE INNOVATION. Visually separate orders by restaurant. Use a nested bento-grid approach where each restaurant is a main '#1F1F1F' container, and items inside are '#121212' rows with image on the left. Have a fixed bottom glassmorphic bar with total price and '#FF8F00' checkout button.
specific_screen_rules.driver_tracking: Since we can't implement a real map easily, mock the map UI with a dark gray background grid and a glowing orange (#FF8F00) route line (using SVG). Overlay the driver detail card at the bottom.
specific_screen_rules.splash_screen: Keep it strictly minimal. Center the logo with an animated glow using #FF8F00. Background must be #121212.
specific_screen_rules.order_tracking: Use a vertical timeline/stepper component. Active stage in #FF8F00, inactive in #1F1F1F. Include timestamps on the right.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='place-order-btn').
